headers.content-security-policy: default-src 'none'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' ajax.cloudflare.com code.jquery.com cdn.datatables.net cdnjs.cloudflare.com cdn.jsdelivr.net unpkg.com static.cloudflareinsights.com www.googletagmanager.com www.gstatic.com www.google.com code.highcharts.com maxcdn.bootstrapcdn.com challenges.cloudflare.com blob:; connect-src 'self' static.cloudflareinsights.com cdn.jsdelivr.net storage.googleapis.com www.googletagmanager.com www.google.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: storage.googleapis.com www.googletagmanager.com asset.inaproc.id public-assets.eproc.dev; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' cdn.jsdelivr.net unpkg.com cdnjs.cloudflare.com fonts.googleapis.com cdn.datatables.net; base-uri 'self'; form-action *; font-src 'self' data: cdnjs.cloudflare.com fonts.gstatic.com cdn.jsdelivr.net unpkg.com; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'self' challenges.cloudflare.com;
headers.permissions-policy: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), fullscreen=(), autoplay=(), accelerometer=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), payment=(), usb=()
